name: jibo-kb
readme:
# jibo-kb

Jibo Knowledge Base API

## Installation

Install using NPM.

```bash
npm install jibo-kb --save
```

## Usage

To initialize the Jibo KB API:

```
import classes from 'jibo-kb';
const kb = new classes.KnowledgeBase();
kb.init(serviceObject, callback);
```

Normally pre-attached and pre-inited and available on the `jibo` global
object as `jibo.kb`.

## Bulk Picture Uploading Tool

There is a script for uploading pictures into the cloud for a
loop in the `tools` directory named `bulkpicturesuploader.js`.

It has three commands: `BulkLoad`, `List`, and `RemoveAll`. You can
get usage info with the `Help` command:

```
$ tools/bulkpictureuploader.js Help
```

The `BulkUpload` command takes the number of pictures to upload and
a directory to read images from (either `.jpg`s or `.png`s). It
resizes all pictures to 1920x1080 and creates the standard two
thumbnails (80x80 for mobile, and 330x330 for robot) and uploads
them together. So if you ask it to upload 50 photos it will upload
150 images total.

The number of photos in the images directory does not need to match
the number you ask to upload, it will just keep reusing the images
found in a loop-wise fashion until it has done the number requested.

Credentials are taken from `~/.jibo/credentials.json` or can be
specified on the command line.
